title: Owned Inspection, Stable Listing, Release Preview, and Accessible Export · Compiler Case: Pokedex Ts Owned Only Inspection
summary: Owned inspect fetches remotely when absent, list order follows Map insertion accidents, release mutates before confirmation, and export dumps internal JSON without a version or accessibility structure. Predict the user decision, runtime value, strict type claim, promise state, API boundary, failure, and observable evidence before reading the governing source. Planned artifact: Add and verify the pokedex ts owned only inspection increment in offline collection manager and structured export. Lear…
objectives: Keep owned inspection offline and return a typed not-owned outcome with explicit next commands.
Prove threshold boundaries, duplicate, changed identity, lookup failure, abort, replay, and previous-state immutability.
Preserve previously learned constraints and attach observable changed-case evidence.
